name: Naji Kanounji
title: Software Engineer
tagline: I build backend systems, AI-powered workflows, and product-focused tools.
summary: I’m a software engineer building backend systems, AI-powered workflows, and product-focused tools. At TomTom, I built an AI-powered feedback triage system, used across slack channels by 2,000+ users and reducing manual triage work by 80%. I also contributed to demo systems showcased at CES 2025.

specialties.title: Backend engineering
specialties.description: APIs, services, and internal tools built for reliability and long-term maintainability.

specialties.title: LLM product engineering
specialties.description: Turning language models into real features: classification, extraction, scoring, and structured output inside production software.

specialties.title: Product-minded development
specialties.description: From internal tools at TomTom to MatchBeforeApply, bridging the gap between engineering and real user problems.
